basics.name: ANJALI KUMARI
basics.title: Software Development Professional
basics.summary: Software Development Professional with hands-on experience in web application design & development. Currently working at C-DAC, contributing to government project domains through full-stack development using Java, Spring Boot, and React.js. Also involved in Information Security internal audits and IT risk assessments aligned with ISMS standards.

experience.company: C-DAC Ministry of Electronics and IT, Govt. of India
bullets: Developed and maintained 30+ RESTful APIs for 11+ modules and built React.js UIs, enabling seamless and high-quality user experiences
Reduced API response times and improved overall application performance by 30% through database query optimization and caching strategies
Designed and implemented secure REST APIs with authentication and role-based access control, developing scalable backend services to handle high-volume API requests
Enterprise Government Platform Modernization: Contributed to modernization of legacy applications into microservices-based architecture
Implemented logging and debugging practices to monitor application behavior, trace issues, and improve system reliability
Delivered production-ready features using GitLab CI/CD pipelines, Docker containerization, and AWS services while following cloud-native practices across development and staging environments
Performed functionality and basic security testing using Postman and Burp Suite at the developer level and implemented unit tests using JUnit and Mockito to ensure code reliability
Collaborated with cross-functional teams in an Agile development environment, contributing to sprint planning and feature delivery
Contributed to ISEA - ISMS internal security audits and ensured adherence to ISMS compliance as an Information Security Representative (ISR) aligned with ISO 27001
Conducted annual risk assessments using CIA triad analysis and VAPT reports to identify vulnerabilities, threat scenarios, and risk ratings
Security: Information security fundamentals, Threats, Risk assessment
Mentored student interns in Java and Spring Boot as an instructor through hands-on sessions and debugging support
Supported Faculty Development Programs (FDPs) as part of the organizing team
Actively participates in organizational initiatives such as sports events, cultural programs, and cybersecurity workshops

E-governance Project Bureau of Indian Standards (BIS): Contributed to modernization of legacy government applications by supporting the transition to a microservices-based architecture using Spring Boot; gained hands-on experience with Java, Spring MVC, Hibernate, Spring Security, JSP, and jQuery
Implemented secure MVC-based applications with database integration, authentication/authorization, CRUD modules, and backend workflows
Contributed in building secure and scalable modules for e-governance services and collaborated with mentors to understand real-world project workflows and coding standards
Developed a strong understanding of secure application design and backend workflows
Built a web-based Plant Equipment Reservation and Management System using EJS, Node.js, and MongoDB for scheduling, equipment listing, and availability tracking; followed Agile practices
Gained experience in SQL, LWC, CRM, and API-based project development using Java

projects.title: Course Application
projects.technologies: Spring Boot, Hibernate, Spring Data JPA, MySQL, Postman, Apache Tomcat, React.js
bullets: Developed a full-stack Course Management Web Application using Spring Boot and React.js
Implemented REST APIs to add, view, and delete courses with MySQL database integration
Built a responsive user interface for seamless course management

education.degree: B.Tech in Computer Science and Engineering (CGPA: 7.92)

certifications.title: EC-Council & Cisco Networking Academy: Ethical Hacking Essentials, Cyber Threat Management, Introduction to Cybersecurity and Web Application Development

publications.title: Enhancing cancer detection and prevention mechanisms using advanced machine learning approaches
